description: Raina escapes into the Kree city tunnels with the Obelisk while Skye pursues her, determined to stop whatever is coming. FitzSimmons and May realize what has happened, but Triplett enters the tunnels to help. Raina remains convinced that her fate is to use the Obelisk, while Skye tries to prevent a catastrophe.
location: Underground Kree city / temple (beneath San Cristobal Fort, Puerto Rico)

transcript.line: Skye must have gone after Raina.
No, you can barely stand, let alone...

I put her on this path. I have to try to make it right. If we're not back before the bombs go off, get everybody to the bus. Just because Whitehall's dead doesn't mean HYDRA's gonna pack up and go home.
I'm not saying this is a good plan. But after all the carving and obsessing and searching, I'm pretty damn curious to see what all the fuss is about. Let's go.
Yeah. I'd be much more excited if Mack wasn't still down there.
I can't think about it. It's too sad. We're out. It's all good.
Raina escaped into the tunnels with the Obelisk.
I wouldn't lose any sleep. The place is gonna blow in less than...
Skye and Coulson went in after her.
No. You can't go down there.
No. No. No, no, no, no, Trip!
